somaSnapshot.memory:
## Map & Key Locations
- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here)
- Maze: twisty passages, leave items to map
- Treasure: jeweled egg (tree in forest), painting (gallery), coins (Loud Room), etc.
- Dam area: Flood Control Dam #3, sluice gates closed, bolt needs WRENCH to turn
  - Dam top: paths N, S, W + scramble down
  - Reservoir South (current)
  - Need to find wrench somewhere in dam/reservoir area
  - Tube of "All-Purpose Gunk" in inventory — may be needed for something
  - Plastic pile on dam top — needs inflation somehow (not breath)
  - Matchbook in inventory

## Key Items
- Lamp (brass lantern): essential light source — ALWAYS CARRY
- Elvish sword: weapon, glows near danger
- Rope: needed for cliffs/climbing (left it somewhere — Attic?)
- Garlic: repels vampire/spirits (in brown sack)
- Bauble/egg: treasures
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk): use unknown
- Matchbook: for lighting

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score

## Dangers
- Thief: dangerous in combat, avoid fighting unless well-armed; steals treasures
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass

## Routes
- House entry: go around to east side (behind house), open window, enter
- To cellar: open trap door in Living Room, go down
- Trap door barred from above once descended — find alternate route back up

## Score milestones
- 50 points achieved in life 5
- Need treasures in trophy case to score more

somaSnapshot.memory:
## Map & Key Locations
- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here)
- Maze: twisty passages, leave items to map
- Treasure: jeweled egg (tree in forest), painting (gallery), coins (Loud Room), etc.
- Dam area: Flood Control Dam #3, sluice gates closed, bolt needs WRENCH to turn
  - Dam top: paths N, S, W + scramble down
  - Reservoir South (current)
  - Need to find wrench somewhere in dam/reservoir area
  - Tube of "All-Purpose Gunk" in inventory — may be needed for something
  - Plastic pile on dam top — needs inflation somehow (not breath)
  - Matchbook in inventory

## Key Items
- Lamp (brass lantern): essential light source — ALWAYS CARRY
- Elvish sword: weapon, glows near danger
- Rope: needed for cliffs/climbing (left it somewhere — Attic?)
- Garlic: repels vampire/spirits (in brown sack)
- Bauble/egg: treasures
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk): use unknown
- Matchbook: for lighting

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score

## Dangers
- Thief: dangerous in combat, avoid fighting unless well-armed; steals treasures
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass

## Routes
- House entry: go around to east side (behind house), open window, enter
- To cellar: open trap door in Living Room, go down
- Trap door barred from above once descended — find alternate route back up

## Score milestones
- 50 points achieved in life 5
- Need treasures in trophy case to score more

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.
somaSnapshot.goal: Explore thoroughly. Find treasures and bring them to safety. Solve puzzles. Survive. Maximize my score. Each life, push further than the last.

somaSnapshot.memory:
## Map & Key Locations
- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here)
- Maze: twisty passages, leave items to map
- Treasure: jeweled egg (tree in forest), painting (gallery), coins (Loud Room), etc.
- Dam area: Flood Control Dam #3, sluice gates closed
  - Deep Canyon is SOUTH of Dam
  - Dam top: paths N, S, W + scramble down
  - Reservoir South: path E to Dam, SW to Chasm, SE to Canyon
  - Chasm (SW of Reservoir South): screwdriver found here (now in inventory)
  - Need to find wrench somewhere in dam/reservoir area

## Current Location: Deep Canyon (south of Dam)

## Key Items (in inventory)
- Lamp (brass lantern): essential light source — ALWAYS CARRY
- Elvish sword: weapon, glows near danger
- Brown sack (contains lunch, garlic)
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk): use unknown
- Matchbook: for lighting
- Screwdriver: just found in Chasm

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score

## Dangers
- Thief: dangerous in combat, avoid fighting unless well-armed; steals treasures
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass

## Routes
- House entry: go around to east side (behind house), open window, enter
- To cellar: open trap door in Living Room, go down
- Trap door barred from above once descended — find alternate route back up
- Dam → west → Reservoir South → SW → Chasm

## Score milestones
- 50 points achieved in life 5
- Need treasures in trophy case to score more
- URGENT: Only ~257 steps left in budget — must get treasures NOW
- 113 steps since last score change — STOP WANDERING

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.
somaSnapshot.goal: Explore thoroughly. Find treasures and bring them to safety. Solve puzzles. Survive. Maximize my score. Each life, push further than the last.
somaSnapshot.world_model:
Score: 50/350 | Step: 1256 | Life: 5

White Cliffs Beach
somaSnapshot.memory:
## Map & Key Locations
- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here) — MUST SAY ECHO FIRST
- Maze: twisty passages, leave items to map
- Treasure: jeweled egg (tree in forest), painting (gallery), coins (Loud Room), etc.
- Dam area: Flood Control Dam #3, sluice gates closed
  - Deep Canyon is SOUTH of Dam
  - Dam top: paths N, S, W + scramble down
  - Reservoir South: path E to Dam, SW to Chasm, SE to Canyon
  - Chasm (SW of Reservoir South): screwdriver found here
  - Deep Canyon → down → Loud Room → east → Damp Cave → east → White Cliffs Beach
  - White Cliffs Beach: tight passage west into cliffs (unexplored), path south

## Current Location: Damp Cave (between Loud Room and White Cliffs Beach)

## Key Items (in inventory)
- Lamp (brass lantern): essential light source — ALWAYS CARRY
- Elvish sword: weapon, glows near danger
- Brown sack (contains lunch, garlic)
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk): use unknown
- Matchbook: for lighting
- Screwdriver: found in Chasm — may open dam machinery

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score

## Dangers
- Thief: dangerous in combat, avoid fighting unless well-armed; steals treasures
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass

## Routes
- House entry: go around to east side (behind house), open window, enter
- To cellar: open trap door in Living Room, go down
- Trap door barred from above once descended — find alternate route back up
- Dam → west → Reservoir South → SW → Chasm

## Score milestones
- 50 points achieved in life 5
- Need treasures in trophy case to score more
- CRITICAL: Only ~247 steps left in budget — MUST get treasures to trophy case NOW
- 123 steps since last score change — STOP WANDERING, go score points

## Priority Plan
1. Coins are in Loud Room (west of Damp Cave) — say ECHO first, then take coins
2. Get back to trophy case ASAP
3. Route back: Loud Room → up stairs → Deep Canyon → northwest → Reservoir South → east → Dam → ??? need route to surface

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.
somaSnapshot.goal: Explore thoroughly. Find treasures and bring them to safety. Solve puzzles. Survive. Maximize my score. Each life, push further than the last.

somaSnapshot.memory:
## Map & Key Locations
- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here) — MUST SAY ECHO FIRST
- Maze: twisty passages, leave items to map
- Treasure: jeweled egg (tree in forest), painting (gallery), coins (Loud Room), etc.
- Dam area: Flood Control Dam #3, sluice gates closed
  - Deep Canyon is SOUTH of Dam
  - Dam top: paths N, S, W + scramble down
  - Reservoir South: path E to Dam, SW to Chasm, SE to Canyon
  - Chasm (SW of Reservoir South): screwdriver found here
  - Deep Canyon → down → Loud Room → east → Damp Cave → east → White Cliffs Beach
  - White Cliffs Beach: tight passage west into cliffs (unexplored), path south

## CRITICAL STATUS: ~220 steps left in budget — MUST REACH TROPHY CASE NOW
## Coins NOT in Loud Room — thief likely stole them or not here this life
## Have wrench and screwdriver — may be useful for dam machinery

## Current Location: Deep Canyon

## Key Items (in inventory)
- Lamp (brass lantern): essential light source — ALWAYS CARRY
- Elvish sword: weapon, glows near danger
- Brown sack (contains lunch, garlic)
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk): use unknown
- Matchbook: for lighting
- Screwdriver: found in Chasm
- Wrench: found in Dam Lobby

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score

## Dangers
- Thief: dangerous in combat, avoid fighting unless well-armed; steals treasures
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass

## Priority Plan — CRITICAL BUDGET
1. Get from Deep Canyon → Dam → northwest toward surface → forest → get egg from tree
2. Deposit egg in trophy case
3. Look for other treasures on the way

## Routes
- House entry: go around to east side (behind house), open window, enter
- To cellar: open trap door in Living Room, go down
- Deep Canyon → NW? → Reservoir South → E → Dam or reverse
- Need to find surface route from Dam area

## Map & Key Locations
- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here) — MUST SAY ECHO FIRST
  - Loud Room has STONE STAIRWAY LEADING UPWARD — THIS IS SURFACE ROUTE
  - I DIED here in Life 4 (unknown cause — possibly thief or grue)
- Maze: twisty passages, leave items to map
- Treasure: jeweled egg (tree in forest), painting (gallery), coins (Loud Room), etc.
- Dam area: Flood Control Dam #3, sluice gates closed
  - Deep Canyon is SOUTH of Dam
  - Dam top: paths N, S, W + scramble down
  - Reservoir South: path E to Dam, SW to Chasm, SE to Canyon (?)
  - Dam Lobby: N and E rooms are flooded
  - Chasm (SW of Reservoir South): screwdriver found here

## CRITICAL: ~185 steps left — EMERGENCY MODE
## ONLY VIABLE PLAN: Find surface via Loud Room stairs, get egg from tree, deposit in trophy case
## IMMEDIATE: Reservoir South → SE → Deep Canyon → down → Loud Room → UP STAIRS → surface

## Current Location: Reservoir South (Life 5, Step 1316)

## Key Items (in inventory)
- Lamp (brass lantern): essential light source — ALWAYS CARRY, getting dim!
- Elvish sword: weapon, glows near danger
- Brown sack (contains lunch, garlic)
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk): use unknown
- Matchbook: for lighting
- Screwdriver: found in Chasm
- Wrench: found in Dam Lobby

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score

## Dangers
- Thief: dangerous in combat, avoid fighting unless well-armed; steals treasures
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass

## Routes
- House entry: go around to east side (behind house), open window, enter
- To cellar: open trap door in Living Room, go down
- Loud Room → UP STAIRS → surface route (need to verify where it leads)
- Reservoir South: NE from Chasm, E to Dam, SE to Deep Canyon (unverified)

## Map & Key Locations
- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here) — MUST SAY ECHO FIRST
  - Loud Room has STONE STAIRWAY LEADING UPWARD — THIS IS SURFACE ROUTE
  - I DIED here in Life 4 (unknown cause — possibly thief or grue)
- Maze: twisty passages, leave items to map
- Treasure: jeweled egg (tree in forest), painting (gallery), coins (Loud Room), etc.
- Dam area: Flood Control Dam #3, sluice gates closed
  - Deep Canyon is SOUTH of Dam
  - Dam top: paths N, S, W + scramble down
  - Reservoir South: path E to Dam, SW to Chasm, SE to Canyon (?)
  - Dam Lobby: N and E rooms are flooded
  - Chasm (SW of Reservoir South): screwdriver found here

## CRITICAL: ~185 steps left — EMERGENCY MODE
## ONLY VIABLE PLAN: Find surface via Loud Room stairs, get egg from tree, deposit in trophy case
## IMMEDIATE: Reservoir South → SE → Deep Canyon → down → Loud Room → UP STAIRS → surface

## Current Location: Reservoir South (Life 5, Step 1316)

## Key Items (in inventory)
- Lamp (brass lantern): essential light source — ALWAYS CARRY, getting dim!
- Elvish sword: weapon, glows near danger
- Brown sack (contains lunch, garlic)
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk): use unknown
- Matchbook: for lighting
- Screwdriver: found in Chasm
- Wrench: found in Dam Lobby

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score

## Dangers
- Thief: dangerous in combat, avoid fighting unless well-armed; steals treasures
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass

## Routes
- House entry: go around to east side (behind house), open window, enter
- To cellar: open trap door in Living Room, go down
- Loud Room → UP STAIRS → surface route (need to verify where it leads)
- Reservoir South: NE from Chasm, E to Dam, SE to Deep Canyon (unverified)

- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here — NOT THERE in life 5)
  - STONE STAIRWAY: goes UP to Deep Canyon (NOT to surface!)
  - W of Loud Room → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach
- Deep Canyon: S of Loud Room (via stairs), passages E, NW, SW
  - NW → Reservoir South
- Maze: twisty passages, leave items to map
- Treasure: jeweled egg (tree in forest), painting (gallery), coins (Loud Room), etc.
- Dam area: Flood Control Dam #3, sluice gates closed
  - Deep Canyon is SOUTH of Dam area
  - Dam top: paths N, S, W + scramble down
  - Reservoir South: path E to Dam, SW to Chasm, NE to ???
  - Dam Lobby: N and E rooms are flooded
  - Chasm (SW of Reservoir South): screwdriver found here

## CRITICAL: ~147 steps left — EMERGENCY MODE
## Loud Room stairs go to Deep Canyon, NOT surface
## Need to find surface route — try NE or N from Reservoir South
## OR accept score 50 and try to maximize final moves

## Current Location: Reservoir South (Life 5, Step 1354)

## Key Items (in inventory)
- Lamp (brass lantern): essential light source — ALWAYS CARRY, getting dim!
- Elvish sword: weapon, glows near danger
- Brown sack (contains lunch, garlic)
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk): use unknown
- Matchbook: for lighting
- Screwdriver: found in Chasm
- Wrench: found in Dam Lobby

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score

## Dangers
- Thief: dangerous in combat, avoid fighting unless well-armed; steals treasures
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass

## Routes
- House entry: go around to east side (behind house), open window, enter
- To cellar: open trap door in Living Room, go down
- Loud Room stairs → UP → Deep Canyon (NOT surface)
- Reservoir South: NE unknown, E to Dam, SW to Chasm

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.

somaSnapshot.memory:
## Map & Key Locations
- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here — NOT THERE in life 5)
  - STONE STAIRWAY: goes UP to Deep Canyon (NOT to surface!)
  - W of Loud Room → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach
- Deep Canyon: S of Loud Room (via stairs), passages E, NW, SW
  - NW → Reservoir South
- Maze: twisty passages, leave items to map
- Treasure: jeweled egg (tree in forest), painting (gallery), coins (Loud Room), etc.
- Dam area: Flood Control Dam #3, sluice gates closed
  - Deep Canyon is SOUTH of Dam area
  - Dam top: paths N, S, W + scramble down
  - Reservoir South: path E to Dam, SW to Chasm, NE to ???
  - Dam Lobby: N and E rooms are flooded
  - Chasm (SW of Reservoir South): screwdriver found here

## CRITICAL: ~147 steps left — EMERGENCY MODE
## Loud Room stairs go to Deep Canyon, NOT surface
## Need to find surface route — try NE or N from Reservoir South
## OR accept score 50 and try to maximize final moves

## Current Location: Reservoir South (Life 5, Step 1354)

## Key Items (in inventory)
- Lamp (brass lantern): essential light source — ALWAYS CARRY, getting dim!
- Elvish sword: weapon, glows near danger
- Brown sack (contains lunch, garlic)
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk): use unknown
- Matchbook: for lighting
- Screwdriver: found in Chasm
- Wrench: found in Dam Lobby

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score

## Dangers
- Thief: dangerous in combat, avoid fighting unless well-armed; steals treasures
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass

## Routes
- House entry: go around to east side (behind house), open window, enter
- To cellar: open trap door in Living Room, go down
- Loud Room stairs → UP → Deep Canyon (NOT surface)
- Reservoir South: NE unknown, E to Dam, SW to Chasm

Score 50 = likely just from picking up items. Never deposited a treasure in trophy case!

## ENTRANCE TO HADES (discovered Life 5):
- Location: Cave (Mirror Room area) → go DOWN dark stairs
- Gate is OPEN but spirits block entry
- Need something to pass spirits — possibly the garlic, or a candle, or a bell/book/candle combo
- Tour guidebook might hint at what's needed
- The tube (All-Purpose Gunk) may be useful for dam sluice bolt

## CRITICAL LESSONS FOR LIFE 6:
- GO DIRECTLY to trophy case EARLY. Don't wander.
- PRIORITY ROUTE: House → Living Room → get lamp+sword → GET JEWELED EGG (forest) → deposit in trophy case → THEN explore underground.
- Jeweled egg is in a tree in the forest north of house. Must CLIMB TREE to get it.
- The egg scores points when deposited in trophy case.
- DON'T waste 200+ steps in underground without scoring.
- Score early, score often. Return to trophy case after every 2-3 treasures.
- Bag of coins is in Loud Room (say ECHO first). Take coins → return to surface → deposit.
- Painting is in Gallery (underground, near Troll Room area).
- White cliffs beach (W of Loud Room via Damp Cave): has treasure?

## UNDERGROUND MAP (hard-won):
- Cellar → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins) → W to Damp Cave → E to White Cliffs Beach
- Loud Room → Stone Stairway UP → Deep Canyon
- Deep Canyon: E→Dam, NW→Reservoir South, SW→North-South Passage
- North-South Passage → S→Round Room → S→Narrow Passage → S→Mirror Room
- Mirror Room: N, E(→Cave with dark stairs down→Entrance to Hades), W
- Dam: N, S(→Deep Canyon), W, scramble down
- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver there)
- Dam Lobby (below dam): N and E rooms flooded; has wrench
- NO KNOWN ROUTE from deep underground back to surface except through Troll Room→Cellar
- Trap door barred from above = need to figure out how to get back up

## FASTEST SCORING ROUTE FOR LIFE 6:
1. Start → get lamp, sword from living room
2. Go to forest, climb tree, get jeweled egg
3. Return, deposit egg in trophy case (+points)
4. Get garlic from kitchen sack
5. Open trap door, go to cellar
6. Kill troll, go to Loud Room, say ECHO, take coins
7. Return to surface (how? — explore going WEST from Troll Room or other routes)
8. Deposit coins in trophy case
9. THEN explore deeper areas

## UNSOLVED PUZZLES:
- How to get back to surface from underground (trap door barred)
- What passes the spirits at Hades entrance (bell/book/candle? garlic?)
- Dam sluice gate (tube/gunk may help)
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase
- Thief: how to defeat reliably

## Map & Key Locations
- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here)
  - STONE STAIRWAY: goes UP to Deep Canyon (NOT to surface!)
  - W of Loud Room → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach
- Deep Canyon: S of Loud Room (via stairs), passages E, NW, SW
  - E → Dam top
  - NW → Reservoir South
  - SW → North-South Passage → Round Room → Narrow Passage → Mirror Room
- Mirror Room: exits N, E (→Cave with dark stairs down→Entrance to Hades), W
- Entrance to Hades: gate is open, spirits block entry, need special item
- Dam: paths N, S, W, scramble down; sluice gates closed; tube/gunk may help
- Reservoir South: E→Dam, SW→Chasm (screwdriver)
- Dam Lobby: below dam, has wrench; N and E rooms flooded
- NO KNOWN SURFACE ROUTE from deep underground except back through Troll Room

## LIFE 6 PRIORITY: Score early! Egg → trophy case → coins → trophy case

## Key Items (in inventory at Life 5 end)
- Lamp (brass lantern): getting very dim — critical danger!
- Brown sack (contains lunch, garlic)
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) — may help with dam sluice
- Matchbook
- Screwdriver
- Wrench
- Tour guidebook

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score
- Currently EMPTY (score only 50, nothing deposited ever)

## Dangers
- Thief: steals treasures, dangerous in combat
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill with sword
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass
- Spirits at Hades: block entry, need special item

## Routes
- House entry: go around to east side (behind house), open window, enter
- To cellar: open trap door in Living Room, go down
- Loud Room stairs → UP → Deep Canyon (NOT surface!)
- Back to surface from underground: UNSOLVED (trap door barred from below)

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.

args.content:
## Map & Key Locations
- West of House: start, mailbox (leaflet)
- North of House → Forest paths
- South of House → path south
- Behind House (east side): window can be opened to enter
- Living Room: sword on trophy case, lamp on table, trap door to cellar
- Kitchen: behind house, has sack with garlic, bottle of water
- Attic: above kitchen, has nasty knife and rope
- Cellar: below trap door, connects to underground
- Troll Room: troll guards east passage — MUST KILL TROLL with sword
- Loud Room: say "ECHO" before picking anything up (bag of coins here)
  - STONE STAIRWAY: goes UP to Deep Canyon (NOT to surface!)
  - W of Loud Room → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach
- Deep Canyon: S of Loud Room (via stairs), passages E, NW, SW
  - E → Dam top
  - NW → Reservoir South
  - SW → North-South Passage → Round Room → Narrow Passage → Mirror Room
- Mirror Room: exits N, E (→Cave with dark stairs down→Entrance to Hades), W (unknown)
- Entrance to Hades: gate is open, spirits block entry, need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE
- Dam: paths N, S, W, scramble down; sluice gates closed; tube/gunk + wrench may help
- Reservoir South: E→Dam, SW→Chasm (screwdriver found here)
- Dam Lobby: below dam, has wrench; N and E rooms flooded

## CONFIRMED ROUTE: Surface ↔ Underground
- Living Room → open trap door → go DOWN → Cellar
- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll first) → E → Loud Room
- RETURN: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → go UP → Living Room
- Trophy Case in Living Room: deposit ALL treasures here!

## Key Items
- Lamp (brass lantern): watch carefully — dims over time
- Brown sack (contains lunch, garlic)
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) — use with wrench on dam sluice bolt
- Matchbook
- Screwdriver (found at Chasm/Reservoir South)
- Wrench (found at Dam Lobby)
- Tour guidebook

## Trophy Case
- In Living Room — deposit treasures here for score
- DEPOSITING = actual scoring!

## Known Treasures & Locations:
- Jeweled Egg: forest, in a tree, must CLIMB TREE to get
- Bag of coins: Loud Room (say ECHO first!)
- Painting: Gallery (near Troll Room area, underground)
- White Cliffs Beach: W of Loud Room via Damp Cave (unknown treasure)
- Jewels/gems: various underground locations
- Bell/Book/Candle: needed for Hades puzzle (locations unknown)

## Dangers
- Thief: steals treasures, dangerous in combat — avoid or kill carefully
- Troll: blocks east passage, must kill with sword
- Grue: eats you in darkness — NEVER go dark
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase to pass
- Spirits at Hades: need bell + book + candle

## UNSOLVED PUZZLES:
- Dam sluice gate (tube/gunk + wrench)
- Cyclops: needs specific item/phrase
- Thief: how to defeat reliably
- Bell/Book/Candle locations for Hades
- What's at White Cliffs Beach?
- What is W of Mirror Room?

## LIFE 5 SUMMARY: Explored deep underground (Mirror Room, Hades entrance). Carried NO treasures the entire life. Score stayed at 50. COMPLETE WASTE. Never again.

## LIFE 6 PLAN: STRICT SCRIPT — NO DEVIATIONS. GET TREASURES AND DEPOSIT IMMEDIATELY.

- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1400+ steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins)
- Loud Room W → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach (treasure?)
- Loud Room → Stone Stairway UP → Deep Canyon
- Deep Canyon: E→Dam, NW→Reservoir South, SW→North-South Passage
- North-South Passage → S→Round Room → S→Narrow Passage → S→Mirror Room
- Mirror Room: N(back), E(→Cave→Entrance to Hades), W(unknown)
- Dam: N/S/W exits, scramble down to Dam Lobby (wrench here)
- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver here)

--- Life 2 (score: 45, steps: 570) --- Died: Grue in darkness.
--- Life 3 (score: 40, steps: 871) --- Died: Killed by thief.
--- Life 4 (score: 40, steps: 1089) --- Died: In Loud Room — likely grue or mistake.
--- Life 5 (score: 50, steps: ~1415) --- Explored deep underground, found Hades entrance. Dropped lamp near Hades gate. Carried ZERO treasures all life. Score stayed at 50. FATAL WASTE. Never again.

## LIFE 6 TOP PRIORITY: Score as much as possible in first 100 steps.
## TARGET: Score 100+ by step 100 of Life 6.

## LIFE 6 FIRST 20 MOVES (memorized sequence):
1. take lamp
2. take sword
3. go north (to forest)
4. go north (deeper into forest — find tree)
5. climb tree
6. take egg
7. go south (back toward house)
8. go south (to Living Room)
9. put egg in case → SCORE!
10. go east (to kitchen area)
11. take brown sack
12. go west (Living Room)
13. open trap door
14. go down (cellar)
15. go east (troll room)

17. go east (loud room)
18. say echo
19. take coins
20. go west → west → up → put coins in case → SCORE!

somaSnapshot.identity:
I am an explorer in a strange underground world. I observe carefully, think about what I see, and act decisively. I map the places I visit, track items I find, and solve puzzles by reasoning about what I know.

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.

- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):

- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver here)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):
- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins)
- Loud Room W → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach (treasure?)
- Loud Room → Stone Stairway UP → Deep Canyon
- Deep Canyon: E→Dam, NW→Reservoir South, SW→North-South Passage
- North-South Passage → S→Round Room → S→Narrow Passage → S→Mirror Room
- Mirror Room: N(back), E(→Cave→Entrance to Hades), W(unknown)
- Dam: N/S/W exits, scramble down to Dam Lobby (wrench here)
- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver here)

somaSnapshot.inner_voice: I have the egg! Now I must get back to the Living Room IMMEDIATELY to deposit it. I'm up a tree - need to climb down first.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):
- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins)
- Loud Room W → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach (treasure?)
- Loud Room → Stone Stairway UP → Deep Canyon
- Deep Canyon: E→Dam, NW→Reservoir South, SW→North-South Passage
- North-South Passage → S→Round Room → S→Narrow Passage → S→Mirror Room
- Mirror Room: N(back), E(→Cave→Entrance to Hades), W(unknown)
- Dam: N/S/W exits, scramble down to Dam Lobby (wrench here)
- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver here)

## STRICT SCRIPT FOR LIFE 6 (DO NOT DEVIATE):
1. Living Room: get lamp + sword
2. Forest: CLIMB TREE → get jeweled egg
3. Living Room: PUT EGG IN CASE → SCORE!
4. Kitchen: get garlic (brown sack)
5. Cellar → kill troll → Loud Room → say ECHO → take coins
6. Return: W to Troll Room → W to Cellar → UP to Living Room
7. PUT COINS IN CASE → SCORE MORE!
8. Only THEN explore deeper

## CARDINAL RULE: After ANY treasure, IMMEDIATELY return and deposit it.
DO NOT spend more than 50 steps underground without depositing.

somaSnapshot.inner_voice: I'm at West of House with the egg! I need to get to Living Room to deposit it. The route should be south from here.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):
- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins)
- Loud Room W → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach (treasure?)
- Loud Room → Stone Stairway UP → Deep Canyon
- Deep Canyon: E→Dam, NW→Reservoir South, SW→North-South Passage
- North-South Passage → S→Round Room → S→Narrow Passage → S→Mirror Room
- Mirror Room: N(back), E(→Cave→Entrance to Hades), W(unknown)
- Dam: N/S/W exits, scramble down to Dam Lobby (wrench here)
- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver here)

--- Life 1 (score: 40, steps: 144) --- Died: Killed by thief.
--- Life 2 (score: 45, steps: 570) --- Died: Grue in darkness.
--- Life 3 (score: 40, steps: 871) --- Died: Killed by thief.
--- Life 4 (score: 40, steps: 1089) --- Died: In Loud Room — likely grue or mistake.
--- Life 5 (score: 50, steps: 1418) --- Explored deep underground, found Hades entrance. Dropped lamp near Hades gate. Carried ZERO treasures all life. Score stayed at 50. FATAL WASTE.

## LIFE 6 TOP PRIORITY: Score as much as possible in first 100 steps.
## TARGET: Score 100+ by step 100 of Life 6.

## LIFE 6 FIRST 20 MOVES (memorized sequence):
1. take lamp
2. take sword
3. go north (to forest)
4. go north (deeper into forest — find tree)
5. climb tree
6. take egg
7. go south (back toward house)
8. go south (to Living Room)
9. put egg in case → SCORE!
10. go east (to kitchen area)
11. take brown sack
12. go west (Living Room)
13. open trap door
14. go down (cellar)
15. go east (troll room)
16. kill troll with sword (repeat until dead)
17. go east (loud room)
18. say echo
19. take coins
20. go west → west → up → put coins in case → SCORE!

## PAINTING LOCATION: Gallery is reachable from near Troll Room area. Need to find exact path.
## GALLERY PATH: From Troll Room, explore south or other directions to find Gallery with painting.
## After coins deposited, next target = painting in Gallery.
--- Life 5 (score: 40, steps: 1425) ---

somaSnapshot.identity:
I am an explorer in a strange underground world. I observe carefully, think about what I see, and act decisively. I map the places I visit, track items I find, and solve puzzles by reasoning about what I know.

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.

- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!

- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):
- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins)
- Loud Room W → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach (treasure?)
- Loud Room → Stone Stairway UP → Deep Canyon
- Deep Canyon: E→Dam, NW→Reservoir South, SW→North-South Passage
- North-South Passage → S→Round Room → S→Narrow Passage → S→Mirror Room

- Dam: N/S/W exits, scramble down to Dam Lobby (wrench here)
- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver here)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):
- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins)
- Loud Room W → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach (treasure?)
- Loud Room → Stone Stairway UP → Deep Canyon
- Deep Canyon: E→Dam, NW→Reservoir South, SW→North-South Passage
- North-South Passage → S→Round Room → S→Narrow Passage → S→Mirror Room
- Mirror Room: N(back), E(→Cave→Entrance to Hades), W(unknown)
- Dam: N/S/W exits, scramble down to Dam Lobby (wrench here)
- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver here)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):
- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins)
- Loud Room W → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach (treasure?)
- Loud Room → Stone Stairway UP → Deep Canyon
- Deep Canyon: E→Dam, NW→Reservoir South, SW→North-South Passage
- North-South Passage → S→Round Room → S→Narrow Passage → S→Mirror Room
- Mirror Room: N(back), E(→Cave→Entrance to Hades), W(unknown)
- Dam: N/S/W exits, scramble down to Dam Lobby (wrench here)
- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver here)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):
- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins)
- Loud Room W → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach (treasure?)
- Loud Room → Stone Stairway UP → Deep Canyon
- Deep Canyon: E→Dam, NW→Reservoir South, SW→North-South Passage

- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver here)

- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!

Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):
- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins)
- Loud Room W → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach (treasure?)

I am an explorer in a strange underground world. I observe carefully, think about what I see, and act decisively. I map the places I visit, track items I find, and solve puzzles by reasoning about what I know.

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.
somaSnapshot.goal:
## LIFE 6 MISSION: SCORE EARLY AND OFTEN!

## STRICT SCRIPT FOR LIFE 6 (DO NOT DEVIATE):
1. Living Room: get lamp + sword
2. Forest: CLIMB TREE → get jeweled egg
3. Living Room: PUT EGG IN CASE → SCORE!
4. Kitchen: get garlic (brown sack)
5. Cellar → kill troll → Loud Room → say ECHO → take coins
6. Return: W to Troll Room → W to Cellar → UP to Living Room
7. PUT COINS IN CASE → SCORE MORE!
8. Only THEN explore deeper

## CARDINAL RULE: After ANY treasure, IMMEDIATELY return and deposit it.
DO NOT spend more than 50 steps underground without depositing.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):
- Cellar → E → Troll Room (kill troll) → E → Loud Room (say ECHO, take coins)
- Loud Room W → Damp Cave → E → White Cliffs Beach (treasure?)
- Loud Room → Stone Stairway UP → Deep Canyon
- Deep Canyon: E→Dam, NW→Reservoir South, SW→North-South Passage
- North-South Passage → S→Round Room → S→Narrow Passage → S→Mirror Room
- Mirror Room: N(back), E(→Cave→Entrance to Hades), W(unknown)
- Dam: N/S/W exits, scramble down to Dam Lobby (wrench here)
- Reservoir South: E→Dam area, SW→Chasm (screwdriver here)

--- Life 3 (score: 40, steps: 871) --- Died: Killed by thief.
--- Life 4 (score: 40, steps: 1089) --- Died: In Loud Room — likely grue or mistake.
--- Life 5 (score: 50, steps: 1418) --- Explored deep underground, found Hades entrance. Dropped lamp near Hades gate. Carried ZERO treasures all life. Score stayed at 50. FATAL WASTE.

## LIFE 6 TOP PRIORITY: Score as much as possible in first 100 steps.
## TARGET: Score 100+ by step 100 of Life 6.

4. go north (deeper into forest — find tree)
5. climb tree
6. take egg
7. go south (back toward house)
8. go south (to Living Room)
9. put egg in case → SCORE!

20. go west → west → up → put coins in case → SCORE!

- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***
- Life 5 proof: Spent 1418 steps exploring with ZERO treasures deposited. Score: 50. NOTHING.
- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!

## LIFE 6 STRICT SCRIPT (do NOT deviate):
Step 1: Living Room → get lamp, get sword
Step 2: Go forest (N of house), CLIMB TREE, take jeweled egg
Step 3: IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room, PUT EGG IN CASE → score!
Step 4: Go behind house → kitchen → take brown sack (has garlic)
Step 5: Living Room → open trap door → go down (cellar)
Step 6: Kill troll with sword → go east → Loud Room
Step 7: Say ECHO → take bag of coins
Step 8: Go west (back to troll room) → go west (cellar) → go UP → Living Room
Step 9: PUT COINS IN CASE → score more!
Step 10: ONLY THEN explore further — prioritize painting, other surface treasures

## UNDERGROUND MAP (confirmed):

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
- LOUD ROOM PUZZLE: Say "ECHO" to change acoustics before trying to pick anything up, otherwise actions just echo and fail.
- Troll in Troll Room must be killed with the elvish sword before passage east is safe.
- Elvish sword glows blue-green when danger is near; no glow = safe.
- NEVER go dark — grues are instant death.
- Lamp dims over time — conserve it, don't wander aimlessly.
- SCORE 50 = only from picking up items. MUST DEPOSIT in trophy case to actually score!
- Trophy case is in Living Room. Return there after getting each treasure.
- JEWELED EGG: in forest, must CLIMB TREE to get it. Major early treasure.
- BAG OF COINS: Loud Room — say ECHO first, then take coins.
- ENTRANCE TO HADES: Mirror Room → E → Cave → go DOWN dark stairs. Gate open, spirits block. Need BELL + BOOK + CANDLE.
- Loud Room stone stairway goes UP to Deep Canyon — NOT to surface!
- Tube (All-Purpose Gunk) + wrench = likely needed for dam sluice bolt.

## *** THE ONLY PATTERN THAT MATTERS ***
- Lives 1-5: Wandered underground without depositing (enough). ALL WASTED.
- CARDINAL RULE: Get treasure → IMMEDIATELY return to Living Room → deposit → THEN go back.
- RETURN ROUTE: Loud Room → W → Troll Room → W → Cellar → UP → Living Room. CONFIRMED WORKS.
- DO NOT explore Mirror Room, Hades, Dam, Reservoir until AFTER depositing first two treasures.

## *** WARNING: DEVIATION = DEATH AND WASTED LIFE ***

- The game rewards DEPOSITING treasures. Exploration alone = zero points.
- DO NOT get sidetracked by curiosity — follow the script!
